writing.title: Writing Task 1: Habit vs right now
writing.prompt: Write a short paragraph (about 40 words) comparing your usual habit with what is happening right now, using Present Simple and Present Continuous.
writing.sampleAnswer: I usually work in an office, but I am working from home today. She usually cooks dinner at seven, but right now, she is cleaning the kitchen instead.
checklist: Có ít nhất 1 câu Present Simple chỉ thói quen
Có ít nhất 1 câu Present Continuous chỉ hành động đang xảy ra
Dùng từ nối "but" để so sánh hai thời điểm

writing.title: Writing Task 1: Review — Shopping and cooking now
writing.prompt: Write a short paragraph (about 50 words) combining countable/uncountable nouns, some/any, quantifiers, and Present Continuous from Chương 4.
writing.sampleAnswer: I have some rice and a few vegetables for dinner. I have plenty of rice, but I don't have any meat. I am cooking some soup right now. Prices are increasing at the market this week, so I am shopping early today.
checklist: Kết hợp được ít nhất 4 cấu trúc đã học trong Chương 4
Đoạn văn có mở-thân-kết đơn giản
Đủ số từ tối thiểu yêu cầu
